reason: entry-point dispatch: briefcase bundle vs cli (mutually exclusive runtime modes)
entry-point dispatch: cli loaded only after the briefcase branch is ruled out

briefcase bundle entry — MUST import cli post-sys.path-swap. The launcher first runs prepare() (briefcase-bundled), then evicts kohakuterrarium.* from sys.modules and prepends the active version tree to sys.path. Importing cli at module top would pin it to the briefcase-bundled framework (defeating the in-process version swap that makes self-update work on briefcase shells where _pth disables PYTHONPATH).
